title: UGETNAME_NoApplicationName
text: UGETNAME_NoApplicationName Determines whether ugetname adds the application name to the return value. UGETNAME_NoApplicationName = 0 | 1 Default value 0 File section [upi] Description Note: Use this setting only if you expect ugetname to return the name of the object without the application name. By default, the application name is appended to the result returned by ugetname . However, some versions of Uniface 9 did not return the application name. If your 3GL application relies on this incompatible behavior, you can use this switch to ensure that it works as you expect it to. [upi] UGETNAME_NoApplicationName=1 Copy Related Links ugetname Return the name of the Windows object associated with a window handle. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
